title: Young People in the Limelight: Theatre Workshop 2016
description: The data consist of a workshop post-recflection and an interview of a youth theater workshop director/instructor. The data were collected as part of a research project entitled "Young People in the Limelight. Towards Agency through Multi-literacies" funded by the Kone foundation. The researcher organised a documentary theatre project with seven people aged 17-28. These young people took part in writing the script as experts of their own life histories.
